---
title: 'Freelance For Hire: Expert Microsoft Excel Assistance for Your Small Business'
date: '2024-09-03T02:44:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Topos Creative, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '3596396729930096012'
blogger_filename: '/p/freelance-for-hire-expert-microsoft.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Creative, LLC/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: left;"><i>Experience with: Google Sheets, Excel, SQL, R, Python, Tableau, Power BI, GitHub, Visual Studio Code, RStudio, AI Prompts (ChatGPT, Perplexity AI, etc.) and Data Analyst Business Intelligence Analyst best practices.&nbsp;</i><p style="text-align: left;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-4bbb11fffe32.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img alt="Topos Creative LLC" border="0" data-original-height="413" data-original-width="663" height="397" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-70d10586af28.jpg" title="Topos Creative LLC" width="640" /></a></p></h3><h4 style="text-align: left;">Let me help you wrangle your data:</h4><p>Are you a small business owner looking to streamline your operations, manage your finances, or organize your data more effectively? Look no further! I offer professional Microsoft Excel services tailored specifically to the needs of local small businesses like yours.</p><p><br /></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">What I Can Do for You:</h4><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Custom Spreadsheets: Create or optimize spreadsheets to help you track expenses, manage inventory, or analyze sales data.</li><li>Data Analysis: Turn your raw data into actionable insights with pivot tables, charts, and other Excel tools.</li><li>Reporting: Generate clear, concise reports that give you a snapshot of your businessâ€™s performance.</li><li>Automation: Save time by automating repetitive tasks with Excel macros or formulas.</li><li>Budgeting &amp; Forecasting: Develop financial models to plan your budget or forecast future trends.</li><li>Troubleshooting: Fix any issues youâ€™re having with your current Excel setup, from broken formulas to slow performance.</li></ul><div><br /></div><p></p><h4 style="text-align: left;">Why Choose Me?</h4><p></p><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Local Expertise: As a member of the community, I understand the unique challenges that small businesses in our area face.</li><li>Affordable Rates: I offer competitive pricing that fits your budget.</li><li>Flexible Availability: I work around your schedule, whether you need help on-site or remotely.</li></ul><p></p><p>Contact Information:&nbsp;</p><p>Donâ€™t let Excel headaches slow you down. Reach out today to discuss your specific needs and how I can help your business thrive!</p><p>Darrell G Wolfe, 208-907-1617, Me@DarrellWolfe.com</p><p>I work remotely but I have limited availability for in-person meetings in the Coeur dAlene/Spokane Valley region.</p><p><br /></p><p>For Reference:</p><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-values-0dc6434cc1a6.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="897" data-original-width="1277" height="450" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-values-864d6170b027.jpg" width="640" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/kootenai.county/viz/ValuesforWebsite/10-YearView">Values for Website | Tableau Public</a><br /><br /></td></tr></tbody></table><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/capstoneproject-coursera-dataanalytics-bab6292740db.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="344" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/capstoneproject-coursera-dataanalytics-a582c6f7fb69.jpg" width="640" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/darrell.wolfe/viz/Capstone_MembervsCasual_Station_Usage/PilotProject">Capstone_Member vs Casual_Station_Usage | Tableau Public</a></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ex-landrates-powerbi-d6f0b63c088b.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ex-landrates-powerbi-2b276325962a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ex-landrates-tableau-with-parcelshapefiles-d90a9af9ce75.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ex-landrates-tableau-with-parcelshapefiles-92889329568c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-fuller-1-6856fbfc56bc.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-fuller-1-0a111234d60c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-fuller-2-791623fa9365.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-fuller-2-227373bc8376.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-summarizedata-coursesforcertification-67c79826c7fe.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-summarizedata-coursesforcertification-665602d47d87.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-tables-conditionalformatting-92707d0acf30.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-tables-conditionalformatting-7c5233e22c13.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-tables-conditionalformatting-2-5e99ed7f964b.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/excel-tables-conditionalformatting-2-f09d985a2719.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/freak-in-the-sheets-63b83b50e7e8.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1665" data-original-width="1284" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/freak-in-the-sheets-a6bcff827499.jpg" width="247" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesgridview-f71a16fb5fa6.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesgridview-940104a49a63.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-5801d0cac5d5.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-e8654dcd300d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-2-75835cd4b8f5.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-2-81e7a239da3c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-3a-d2dac5f48875.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-3a-6901e3d26914.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-3b-filtered-a505f04631fc.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-3b-filtered-c41d33fb6555.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-3c-filtered-highlightedoutliers-kootenaisouthgrowing-c079c54fd971.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/powerbi-valuesovertime-3c-filtered-highlightedoutliers-kootenaisouthgrowing-785dad745f3f.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-boba-ef4df62e864c.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="823" data-original-width="700" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-boba-660f9629788c.jpg" width="272" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/darrell.wolfe/viz/CourseraBobaTeaShopRatings_Map/StoryCourseraBobaTeaShopRatings">Coursera: Boba Tea Shop Ratings_Map | Tableau Public</a></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-chartdashboardexamplesonly-ff7423732bd0.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-chartdashboardexamplesonly-36a27fde3bb9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-exemptiontool-step1-e2e6824a5131.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-exemptiontool-step1-f41d3bb48919.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-exemptiontool-step2-embdedonwebsite-e5c281e162d0.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-exemptiontool-step2-embdedonwebsite-f2a2943ca6ee.jpg" width="320" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://www.kcgov.us/1066/Homeowners-Exemption-Search-Tool">Homeowner's Exemption Search Tool | Kootenai County, ID (kcgov.us)</a></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-valuesbytaxauthority-48604b6ee30e.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="776" data-original-width="979" height="254" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-valuesbytaxauthority-bd0e37bb5d0d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-valuesbytype-ac019860e9cc.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1032" data-original-width="1920" height="172" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-kcas-valuesbytype-61bedbe3e1f9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-uk-roadsafety-2bc5d0e01bc5.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="466" data-original-width="1713" height="87" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tableau-uk-roadsafety-5299472b1005.jpg" width="320" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/darrell.wolfe/viz/UKRoadSafetyData_16938634422570/Totals">UK Road Safety Data | Tableau Public</a></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-4bbb11fffe32.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="413" data-original-width="663" height="199" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-white-98164f8ba4ef.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-61b02668635a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="483" data-original-width="591" height="262" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-7bf78d688aeb.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-black-f7fd7f613684.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="426" data-original-width="623" height="219" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/topos-logo-on-black-71d640ac90fd.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br />
